overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark robe walking along a stone railway viaduct at golden hour. The character approaches and passes by Hogwarts castle visible in the distance, then continues past two students sitting on the wall. The scene features dramatic warm lighting with partly cloudy skies and misty mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone railway viaduct with walking path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside railway tracks, with rocky cliffs on the left and trees ahead

entered.detail: tall stone wall with railway tracks running along the top, weathered bricks with moss
metal railway tracks embedded in the stone viaduct structure
chest-high stone wall forming the right edge of the walkway
tall deciduous trees with dense green foliage visible beyond the viaduct
steep rocky cliff rising behind the viaduct wall
dramatic clouds illuminated by warm golden hour sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path on a stone railway viaduct. To the left, railway tracks run parallel to the path atop a high stone wall, with rocky cliffs rising behind. On the right, a stone parapet wall provides a boundary. Ahead, green trees and golden clouds are visible against the warm evening sky.

events.description: Hogwarts castle with tall spires comes into view on the right side across the lake

agents.ego_description: continuing along the viaduct path as the castle reveals itself in the misty distance

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires and towers, silhouetted against the golden sky and mist
calm body of water visible below the viaduct, reflecting the castle and mountains

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the view opens to reveal Hogwarts castle in the distance on the right, its spires silhouetted against the golden clouds. The viaduct continues straight ahead with the stone walls flanking the path, while a misty lake becomes visible below. The trees from the previous section are now behind as the landscape opens up.

events.description: two students sitting on the stone wall come into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past two students who are sitting on the parapet wall overlooking the view

notable_agents.action: two students in casual clothing sitting on the stone parapet wall, looking out at the mountain landscape

segments.scene_description: The castle passes out of view as the character continues along the viaduct. Two students are sitting on the stone parapet wall to the right, looking out at the misty mountains. The character walks past them and continues along the cobblestone path, with the railway tracks still running parallel on the left and the mountainous landscape visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stone railway viaduct that transitions from a confined path into a sweeping vista of a magical landscape. It begins with the character walking a cobblestone path flanked by railway tracks and rocky cliffs under a warm evening sky. As the character advances, the view opens up to reveal the silhouetted spires of Hogwarts castle and a misty lake below, while the surrounding trees recede into the background. The scene then shifts as the castle passes out of sight, bringing the camera alongside two students perched on the stone parapet wall. Finally, the character moves past the students and continues forward, with the path stretching toward a distant, mountainous horizon.
